'''''Zeta''-class shuttle''' was a long-range personnel [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Zeta''-class shuttle was a blocky transport that was designed for rapid transit of personnel over great distances and was not suited for combat maneuvers. The shuttle had two large fuel tanks mounted on the port and starboard side, which carried additional fuel and life-support components for long-distance travels. These tanks were designed to be modular, so that empty ones could quickly be replaced at a stopover.

==History==
Produced by the [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]], the ''Zeta''-class was included in the initial load out of [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyers]]. The ''Zeta''-class was retired with the advent of the [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems's]] combat-oriented [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]].

The ''Zeta''-class shuttle ''[[Arkanoid]]'' was [[Scavenger/Legends|salvaged]] by the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[P'laang Ri]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] of [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. When used by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Avik Lore]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] shortly after the battle to infiltrate the Empire's [[Zoma Station]], the ''Arkanoid'' was given no suspicion by Imperial personnel at the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] as it [[Hangar/Legends|docked]].<ref name="Renegade">''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]''</ref>

One other ''Zeta''-class shuttle was assigned to the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Admonitor]]'', during her mission in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], per request of then-[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. There were rumors among Thrawn's support staff that the alien had requested the shuttle to quickly return to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] from his exile, should he ever be pardoned. Thrawn, however used the shuttle on one occasion to successfully infiltrate and destroy an [[Ebruchi]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] clan.<ref name="CD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]''
